name_en: 💎45💎!!️【New】GG Marmont Small Shoulder Bag in Denim. This piece is from the Gucci Lido collection, inspired by the summer vibes and beach clubs of the Italian coast. The small chain shoulder bag features a soft yet structured design with a large flap closure adorned with double G hardware. The adjustable chain strap allows for versatile styling, transitioning between shoulder and hand carry. Crafted in blue GG denim with dark blue trim for a refined touch. Blue GG denim, dark blue trim, gold-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, double G, zippered interior pocket, chain strap (55cm) or top handle (30cm). Spring snap flap closure, weight: approx. 0.648kg.
